title: Gentle Dense Slovakian Pork Stew
description: A hearty and comforting Slovakian dish featuring pork, vegetables, and unsweetened coconut milk, with a rich umami flavor from shio-cure.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the pork and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion, carrots, and potatoes, and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 10 minutes.
Add the shio-cure, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes.
Stir in the unsweetened coconut milk and continue to simmer, uncovered, for 10 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
Cook pork to an internal temperature of 63°C / 145°F and let it rest for 3 minutes before serving.
